name.en: Heat Core the Mad Fiend of Despair
name.ja: <ruby>絶<rt>ぜつ</rt></ruby><ruby>望<rt>ぼう</rt></ruby><ruby>狂<rt>きょう</rt></ruby><ruby>魔<rt>ま</rt></ruby>ヒート・コア

requirement.en: Shuffle 4 monsters from your Graveyard into the Deck.

effect.en: Special Summon 1 Level 9 or lower monster from your opponent's Graveyard face-up to your field. Then, you can Special Summon 1 Fiend Type monster from your Graveyard to your opponent's field in face-up Defense Position.

materials.en: "Dead Core the Mad Fiend of Despair" + "Dead Heat the Mad Fiend of Despair"
